en-US.name: Queen Rearing: Graft & Mating
en-US.subtitle: Bee Cell Timing & Nuc Tracker
en-US.promotional_text: Rearing queen bees? Track each graft batch and get today's mating-window verdict from local weather - know when to move cells, mate, or re-cell.
en-US.description:
Rearing queens means running several graft batches on a tight, rolling schedule - and the hardest part isn't the calendar, it's the weather. Virgin queens only mate during a narrow afternoon window, and a run of cool or cloudy days can quietly age a batch past the point of no return.

Queen Rearing turns each batch's timeline and today's local forecast into one clear answer per nuc - GO TO MATE, WAIT, RE-CELL, or CHECK FOR EGGS.

HOW IT WORKS
1. Add a batch: graft date, method, nuc type, and drone readiness.
2. Queen Rearing reads the afternoon mating-flight conditions for your location.
3. You get today's action for each batch, plus the mating-window verdict, with the reason behind it.
It takes 20 seconds to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Mating Window
A single verdict for the afternoon flight window - temperature, cloud, and wind read at a glance instead of guessing from raw numbers.

Batch Timeline
See each batch's cell-capping, emergence, maturation, and mating milestones counted from your graft date.

Today's Action Per Batch
Move the cell, hold for the window, re-cell before it's too late, or check for eggs - the right step for where each batch is right now.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Unlimited concurrent batches on one rolling schedule
- Out-of-timing early warning for nucs burning their mating window
- 7-day mating-window forecast to plan re-celling
- Multi-nuc and breeder-line color tags
- Reminders for move-cell, emergence, window-open, and re-cell
- Per-nuc calibration that learns your yard over the season

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch the local afternoon weather forecast, never stored on any server
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Queen Rearing is an informational scheduling and reference tool based on general queen-rearing principles and public weather data. It does not guarantee mating outcomes. Always inspect your colonies directly and consult experienced beekeepers.

Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
